loop.observation: Contracts broad CI workflows verified dependency policy, enumgen, fsmgen, lint, and tests, but two workflows did not publish their own evidence JSON.
loop.hypothesis: Binding both broad CI workflows to a compact evidence tool makes previously implicit CI gates observable without changing contract runtime semantics.
loop.execute: Add tools/cievidence, run it from ci.yml and go-ci.yml with workflow-specific command expectations, and upload strict evidence artifacts.
loop.evaluate: Local and public CI verification must show both evidence artifacts are generated, command coverage is verified, and executable knowledge coverage still reports zero manual docs or loop debt.
loop.retrospective: Broad CI is now evidence-producing orchestration rather than an unstructured green check, leaving domain workflows to keep owning detailed contract semantics.
